zh.lifeSummary: 當William Botreaux於1337年9月1日出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍萊亞斯時，他的父親William de Botreaux22歲，母親Isabel de Moels21歲。他於1370年2月14日之後與Elizabeth Daubeny在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1391年8月10日在英國可瓦爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Botreaux于1337年9月1日出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾藍萊亞斯时，他的父亲William de Botreaux22岁，母亲Isabel de Moels21岁。他于1370年2月14日之后与Elizabeth Daubeny在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1391年8月10日在英国可瓦爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Botreaux was born on 1 September 1337, in Lanreath, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Botreaux, was 22 and his mother, Isabel de Moels, was 21. He married Elizabeth Daubeny after 14 February 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 10 August 1391, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in North Cadbury, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Botreaux est né le 1 septembre 1337, à Lanreath, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Botreaux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Moels, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Daubeny après 14 février 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 10 août 1391, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Botreaux am 1. September 1337 in Lanreath, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Botreaux 22 und seine Mutter Isabel de Moels 21. Er hat nach 14. Februar 1370 in England Elizabeth Daubeny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 10. August 1391 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in North Cadbury, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Botreaux è nato il il 1 settembre 1337 nel Lanreath, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Botreaux, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Moels, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Daubeny dopo il 14 febbraio 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 10 agosto 1391, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a North Cadbury, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Botreauxが1337年9月1日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルランレアスで生まれた時，父William de Botreauxは22歳，母Isabel de Moelsは21歳であった。1370年2月14日以後にイギリスでElizabeth Daubenyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1391年8月10日にイギリスコルンワルで53歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Botreaux(이)가 1337년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Botreaux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Moels(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1370년 2월 14일 이후 영국에서 Elizabeth Daubeny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1391년 8월 10일 영국 코른월에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.1 September 1337–10 August 1391: 1 de setembro de 1337–10 de agosto de 1391
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Botreaux nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1337, em Lanreath, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Botreaux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Moels, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Daubeny após 14 de fevereiro de 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1391, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Botreaux родился 1 сентября 1337 г. в местности ланрит, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Botreaux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Moels, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Daubeny после 14 февраль 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 10 августа 1391 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия.

es.1 September 1337–10 August 1391: 1 de septiembre de 1337–10 de agosto de 1391
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Botreaux nació el 1 de septiembre de 1337, en Lanreath, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Botreaux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel de Moels, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Daubeny después de 14 de febrero de 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1391, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra.
